rationale: Scope/signature/no-regression + provenance lens all clear. SCOPE: full-bead delta (1906e39e..33a8ce8d) is 100% within internal/panel|complete|bead; redesign is ONE commit (33a8ce8d), no ADR/plan/doc edits (deferred to Bead 3/orchestrator as designed). SIGNATURE: panelGate 3-tuple (*Registration,[]Refutation,error) -> 2-tuple (*Registration,error) confirmed; ALL call sites consistent (1 prod complete.go:387 destructures 2 values; every test site in panel_advisory_test/panel_gate_e2e_test/panel_gate_layout_test uses 2-tuple); zero orphaned appliedRefutations/appliedOrigins references; outcome-preserving. PROVENANCE: reconcilePendingRefutations is now (beadID string) error, reads ONLY bead metadata, opens NO panel dir; all deleted symbols grep-clean; marker struct self-contained {Slot,Round,Reason,Evidence}, origin/Panels dropped. AC2/AC4b/AC11 map to named passing tests (SatisfyFromMarker_PanelGone, NaturalResolution_NoObligation, MarkerCarriesReasonEvidence, Hatch/AlreadyCovered/Malformed); AC11 satisfy-from-marker language shift is the intended operator decision and tests reflect it; AC3/7/8/9/12 anti-gaming preserved — internal/panel byte-unchanged vs ce9f5395. NO-REGRESSION: build+gofmt+vet clean; panel/complete/bead/cmd tests + -race all green in /tmp; mutation swallowing the reconcile write error turns exactly 4 named tests RED — tests are real.

findings.note: Redesign lands as one commit within the fenced dirs; no ADR/plan/doc leakage.
3-tuple->2-tuple panelGate change consistent across the single prod call site and all six+ test call sites; no half-applied edit, no orphaned deleted-symbol references.
AC2/AC4b/AC11 satisfy-from-marker semantics backed by named passing tests; AC3/7/8/9/12 preserved via byte-unchanged internal/panel.
